symptoms.symptom_name: Spontaneous continuous gingival bleeding without trauma

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Spontaneous mucosal bleeding indicates severe thrombocytopenia, typically from marrow failure when combined with fever and anaemia.
Patient takes no anticoagulant, aspirin or NSAID, so drug-induced bleeding is unlikely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fever and sore throat over three days

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Fever with probable neutropenia is a sepsis emergency and points to marrow suppression.
Profound fatigue with pallor reflects significant anaemia from marrow replacement.

symptoms.symptom_name: New petechiae, purpura and forearm skin lesions

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Petechiae and purpura are hallmarks of thrombocytopenia; raised infiltration lesions suggest leukaemia cutis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Dull sternal (breastbone) ache reported by patient

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bone pain reflects marrow expansion by leukaemic cells.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Symptomatic anaemia with early haemodynamic compromise
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Orthostatic symptoms and tachycardia indicate the anaemia and blood loss are becoming haemodynamically significant.

symptoms.symptom_name: No anticoagulant, aspirin or NSAID use

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Excludes the common drug causes of mucosal bleeding, shifting suspicion to a primary marrow/platelet disorder.

symptoms.symptom_name: Gingival hypertrophy with spontaneous oozing (clinician examination finding)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Gingival hypertrophy from leukaemic infiltration is characteristic of monocytic AML subtypes; a clinician exam finding, sealed and not obtainable via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Sternal tenderness on light palpation (clinician sign)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sternal tenderness reflects marrow expansion; requires clinician palpation and cannot be elicited remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Leukaemia cutis lesions on the forearm (clinician-examined)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Cutaneous leukaemic infiltration is highly specific for leukaemia but requires in-person examination and biopsy to characterise.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachycardia, borderline blood pressure and mild tachypnoea (clinician vitals)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Anaemia with haemodynamic compromise / early sepsis
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Clinician-measured HR 112, BP 105/65, RR 20 corroborate compensated haemodynamic stress; sealed, as calibrated vitals are not available in telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Peripheral blood film showing myeloblasts and Auer rods; coagulation studies

investigation_details.investigation_name: Full blood count, coagulation studies and peripheral blood film (with bone marrow examination)
investigation_details.expected_result: Pancytopenia with circulating myeloblasts (>20%) and Auer rods on the film; confirmation requires bone marrow aspirate, flow cytometry and cytogenetics.
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The diagnosis cannot be confirmed and life-threatening cytopenias go unrecognised and untreated.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Auer rods and a blast excess on the film are diagnostic of AML — a hospital investigation, never available in a telehealth encounter.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Spontaneous mucosal bleeding + fever + petechiae together signal pancytopenia from marrow failure and mandate immediate emergency escalation, regardless of the specific underlying diagnosis.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent full blood count, coagulation studies and peripheral blood film
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Defines the degree of thrombocytopenia, neutropenia and anaemia and identifies blasts/Auer rods — but must be done in person; the AI can only arrange emergency transfer, not obtain it.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Bone marrow aspirate and trephine with flow cytometry and cytogenetics
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive characterisation of the leukaemia — a hospital haematology procedure, never available in telehealth.
